channel.title: MSSQ on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in MSSQ on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] General availability: Azure SQL updates for mid-March 2026
item.description:
Azure SQL received mid-March 2026 updates including direct publishing of SQL database projects from Visual Studio Code and the ability to view and edit SQL table data directly in MSSQ.

  • Source: Azure Updates
